title: Exploring Citizen Support for Different Types of Climate Policy
authors: Ekaterina Rhodes, Jonn Axsen, Mark Jaccard

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: a carbon tax applying to all individuals and businesses
tax_mentions.context: Survey item on support or opposition to climate policies in Canada; analyzed in descriptive statistics and logistic regressions.
tax_mentions.notes: Also compared with cap-and-trade and regulations.

inclusion_reason: Contains a direct survey analysis of support/opposition for a carbon tax in Canada, with regression models of determinants.
